testcase.name: example_dropshipping

failure.message:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Output mismatch for test 'example_dropshipping'. Kotlin stdout: 7
C++ stdout: 2 ==> expected: <7> but was: <2>

testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Output mismatch for test 'example_dropshipping'. Kotlin stdout: 7
C++ stdout: 2 ==> expected: <7> but was: <2> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1156) at app//transpiler.TranspilerTest.runTest(TranspilerTest.kt:96) at app//transpiler.TranspilerTest.allTests$lambda$3$lambda$2(TranspilerTest.kt:41) at java.base@11.0.11/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:183) at java.base@11.0.11/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541) at java.base@11.0.11/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541)

testcase.name: example_omkar_time_travel

failure.message:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Output mismatch for test 'example_omkar_time_travel'. Kotlin stdout: 138
C++ stdout: ==> expected: <138> but was: <>
